title: AI Student Care Assistant
description: An intelligent AI-powered assistant built to support university students with academic advising, mental health resources, and campus navigation. Utilizes RAG pipelines and LLMs for contextual, empathetic responses.
impact: Reduced student wait times by 60% and handled 2,000+ queries in pilot deployment.

title: Automated Analytics System
description: End-to-end automated data pipeline and analytics dashboard that processes raw data streams, applies ML models for anomaly detection, and generates real-time visual reports for stakeholders.
impact: Automated 40+ hours of manual reporting weekly, improved data accuracy by 35%.

title: NLP Research — RAG & LLMs
description: Advanced research on Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems, fine-tuning large language models for domain-specific knowledge extraction and question-answering tasks.
impact: Published findings improving retrieval accuracy by 28% over baseline approaches.

title: Real-Time Sentiment Dashboard
description: Live sentiment analysis dashboard processing social media streams with NLP models, providing brands with real-time public perception metrics and trend detection.
impact: Tracked 50K+ data points daily with 92% classification accuracy.
